content: Input: LLM \(G\), #node limit per-instance \(N\), #GPU per-node \(M\), GPU memory capacity \(C\), workload \(W\), traffic rate \(R\).

configp, configd \(\leftarrow \emptyset ,\emptyset\)   
for intra_op \(\in \{1,2,\dots,M\}\) do   
for inter_op \(\in \{1,2,\dots,\frac{N\times M}{\text{intra\_op}}\}\) do if \(G.\text{size}\) inter_op×intra_op \(<  C\) then config \(\leftarrow\) (inter_op,intra_op) \(\hat{G}\gets\) parallel(G,config) config.goodput \(\leftarrow\) simul_prefix( \(\hat{G},W)\) if configgoodput \(<  _{\mathrm{config\_num\_gpus}} <   _{\mathrm{config\_num\_gpus}}\) then config \(\leftarrow\) config config.goodput \(\leftarrow\) simuldecode( \(\hat{G},W)\) if \(^ { \text{config} _ { d } . \text{good} p u t }\) \(<  _{\mathrm{config\_num\_gpus}}\) then config \(<  _{\mathrm{config}}\)   
\(n,m\leftarrow \lceil \frac{R}{\text{config}p.\text{goodput}}\rceil ,\lceil \frac{R}{\text{config}d.\text{goodput}}\rceil\)   
best_plm \(\leftarrow\) (n, configp,m, configd)   
return best_plm

Input: LLM \(G\) #node limit per-instance \(N\) #GPU per-node \(M\) GPU memory capacity \(C\) ,workload \(W\) traffic rate \(R\)   
Output: the placement best_plm. config\* \(\leftarrow \emptyset\) for inter_op \(\in \{1,2,\dots,N\}\) do \(\mathcal{P}\gets\) get_intra_node_config(G,M,C,inter_op) for \(P_{p}\in \mathcal{P}\) do for \(P_{d}\in \mathcal{P}\) do if \(P_{p}.\mathrm{num\_gpus} + P_{d}.\mathrm{num\_gpus}\leq M\) then config \(\leftarrow\) (inter_op, \(P_{p},P_{d})\) \(\hat{G}_p,\hat{G}_d\gets\) parallel(G,config) config.goodput \(\leftarrow\) simulate \((\hat{G}_p,\hat{G}_d,W)\) if \(\frac{\text{config.*goodput}}{\text{config.*num_gpus}} <  \frac{\text{config.goodput}}{\text{config.*num_gpus}}\) then config\* \(\leftarrow\) config   
\(n\gets \lceil \frac{R}{\text{config.*goodput}}\rceil\)   
best_plm \(\leftarrow\) (n, config*)   
return best_plm

\[
T _ {1} = C _ {1} \cdot \left(4 t h ^ {2} + 2 t h m\right)
\]

\[
T _ {4} = C _ {5} \cdot n \cdot 3 s \sum_ {i = 0} ^ {B - 1} l _ {i} = C _ {5} \cdot 3 h t
\]

\[
T _ {D e c o d i n g} = C _ {4} \cdot (4 h ^ {2} + 2 h m) + C _ {5} \cdot 3 h t
\]
